Engineering.tagline: Architecting the Future with Logic and Innovation ⚙️

overview.name: Computer Science (CSE)
desc: Core software engineering and algorithms.
High demand in global tech giants.
Highest starting salaries in India.

overview.name: Technology & AI (IT/AI)
desc: Focus on Artificial Intelligence and Cloud.
Building smart, learning machines.
Future-proof career in digital tech.
overview.sub: Python, ML, Neural Networks

overview.name: Civil & Infrastructure
desc: Design smart cities and mega bridges.
Manage infrastructure projects.
Excellent Government job opportunities (PWD/WRD).
overview.sub: Structural Analysis, Surveying, CAD

overview.name: Mechanical Engineering
desc: Design and develop mechanical systems.
Work in manufacturing, automotive, aerospace, and energy sectors.
High demand in government and private industries.
overview.sub: Thermodynamics, Machine Design, Robotics

overview.name: Electrical Engineering
desc: Study of electricity, electronics, and electromagnetism.
Work in power generation, transmission, and renewable energy.
Government jobs in state electricity boards and public sector units.
overview.sub: Power Systems, Renewable Energy, Control Systems

overview.name: Biotechnology Engineering
desc: Apply engineering principles to biology and medicine.
Work in healthcare, agriculture, and environmental sustainability.
Growing field with global impact.
overview.sub: Genetic Engineering, Pharma R&D, Environmental Biotech

overview.name: Petroleum Engineering
desc: Focus on extraction of oil and gas.
Work in energy sector with high-paying jobs.
Involves reservoir engineering, drilling technology, and environmental safety.
overview.sub: Reservoir Engineering, Drilling Technology, Environmental Safety

cse.name: Computer Science & Engineering (CSE)
cse.description: The study of computers, computational systems, and software development.
path_after_10th: Option 1: 11th & 12th Science (PCM) with Computer Science as Vocational subject
Option 2: 3-Year Diploma in Computer Engineering (Polytechnic)
Option 3: ITI Computer Operator & Programming Assistant (COPA)

benefits.title: Universal Career Growth
benefits.info: CSE graduates can work in any industry, from finance to healthcare to gaming.

benefits.title: Remote Work Flexibility
benefits.info: Many CSE jobs offer remote work options, allowing for a better work-life balance.

benefits.title: Global Opportunities
benefits.info: Work with top tech companies worldwide or as a freelancer.

sub_categories.title: Full Stack Development
sub_categories.info: Building both the user facing part(frontend) and the server side (backend) of applications.
sub_categories.skills: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Node.js, Databases

sub_categories.title: Database Management (DBMS)
sub_categories.info: Designing and managing systems that store and organize huge amounts of company data.
sub_categories.skills: SQL, NoSQL, Database Design, Data Modeling

sub_categories.title: operating systems and Architectures
sub_categories.info: Understanding how operating systems function and designing efficient system architectures.
sub_categories.skills: Linux, Windows, System Design, Networking

sub_categories.title: Software Testing & Quality Assurance
sub_categories.info: Ensuring software products are reliable and meet quality standards through rigorous testing.
sub_categories.skills: Selenium, JUnit, Test Automation, Bug Tracking

sub_categories.title: Mobile App Development
sub_categories.info: Creating applications for mobile devices, focusing on user experience and performance.
sub_categories.skills: Android, iOS, Flutter, React Native

tech.name: Technology & AI (IT/AI)
tech.description: The backbone of the modern digital world, focusing on software, intelligence, and security.
path_after_10th: Option 1: 3-Year Diploma in IT (Practical + Skill based)
Option 2: 11th & 12th Science (PCM)
Option 3: ITI Information Technology (Early job entry)

benefits.title: High Demand
benefits.info: Every industry—from smart farming to hospitals—needs tech experts.

benefits.title: Salary Growth
benefits.info: Entry-level packages for AI/ML roles are significantly higher than traditional roles.

benefits.title: Innovation
benefits.info: Build things that didn't exist before, like self-driving cars or AI doctors.

sub_categories.title: Ai &  Machine Learning
sub_categories.info: Creating machines that learn and evolve like the human brain

sub_categories.title: Cloud Computing
sub_categories.info: Modern internet servers and infrastructure management.
sub_categories.skills: AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Linux

sub_categories.title: Data Science & Analytics
sub_categories.info: Extracting insights from massive datasets.
sub_categories.skills: Python, R, SQL, Statistics

sub_categories.title: Cybersecurity
sub_categories.info: Protecting data and networks from cyber threats.
sub_categories.skills: Networking, Linux, Ethical Hacking,networking

tech.jobs: AI Engineer, Cloud Architect, Data Scientist

civil.name: Civil & Infrastructure Engineering
civil.description: Designing and building the physical infrastructure that supports modern life.
path_after_10th: Option 1: 11th & 12th Science (PCM) for Degree (B.E./B.Tech)
Option 2: 3-Year Diploma in Civil Engineering (Polytechnic)
Option 3: ITI Draughtsman (Civil) for early site-work entry

benefits.title: Nation Building
benefits.info: Civil engineers build the essential infrastructure of a country, from bridges and dams to high-speed railways.

benefits.title: Government Job Opportunities
benefits.info: High demand for civil engineers in government departments (PWD, NHAI).

benefits.title: On field & office Balance
benefits.info: Ideal for those who don't want to sit in front of a computer all day and enjoy visiting construction sites.

sub_categories.title: Structural Engineering
sub_categories.info: Designing the 'bones' of buildings to ensure they can withstand loads like wind and earthquakes.
sub_categories.skills: AutoCAD, STAAD.Pro, Physics, Material Science

sub_categories.title: Transportation Engineering
sub_categories.info: Planning and building efficient road networks, highways, and airport runways.
sub_categories.skills: Surveying, Pavement Design, Traffic Management

sub_categories.title: Environmental Engineering
sub_categories.info: Developing systems for clean water, waste management, and pollution control.
sub_categories.skills: Biology, Chemistry, Water Treatment Design

sub_categories.title: Smart City Planning
sub_categories.info: Integrating technology with urban infrastructure for sustainable and efficient cities.
sub_categories.skills: Urban Planning, IoT, GIS, Sustainable Design

civil.jobs: Site Engineer, Urban Planner, Structural Designer, Govt Contractor

petroleum.name: Petroleum Engineering
petroleum.description: The study of extraction of oil and gas efficiently while minimizing environmental impact.
path_after_10th: Option 1: 11th & 12th Science (PCM) for Degree (B.E./B.Tech)
Option 2: 3-Year Diploma in Petroleum Engineering (Polytechnic)
Option 3: ITI Drilling Technician (Direct entry into oil rigs)

benefits.title: High-Paying Jobs
benefits.info: Petroleum engineers are among the highest-paid engineers due to the critical nature of their work.

benefits.title: Global Opportunities
benefits.info: Work in oil-rich regions around the world, including the Middle East, USA, and Africa.

benefits.title: Energy Sector Impact
benefits.info: Play a key role in energy production and transition to cleaner fuels.

sub_categories.title: Reservoir Engineering
sub_categories.info: Analyzing underground formations to optimize oil and gas extraction.
sub_categories.skills: Geology, Fluid Mechanics, Simulation Software

sub_categories.title: Drilling Technology
sub_categories.info: Designing and managing drilling operations to access oil reserves safely.
sub_categories.skills: Drilling Techniques, Safety Protocols, Equipment Management

sub_categories.title: Environmental Safety
sub_categories.info: Ensuring that extraction processes minimize environmental damage and comply with regulations.
sub_categories.skills: Environmental Science, Risk Assessment, Regulatory Compliance

petroleum.jobs: Reservoir Engineer, Drilling Engineer, Environmental Safety Officer

mech.name: Mechanical Engineering
mech.description: The branch of engineering that combines physics and mathematics with materials science to design, analyze, and maintain mechanical systems.
path_after_10th: Option 1: 11th & 12th Science (PCM) for Degree (B.E./B.Tech)
Option 2: 3-Year Diploma in Mechanical Engineering (Polytechnic)
Option 3: ITI Fitter, Machinist, or Turner (Direct technical entry)

benefits.title: Evergreen Field
benefits.info: Mechanical engineering is one of the oldest and broadest branches, ensuring jobs in almost every manufacturing industry.

benefits.title: Hands-on Work
benefits.info: Perfect for students who enjoy working with tools, engines, and physical prototypes rather than just software.

benefits.title: Global Opportunities
benefits.info: Skills in machine design and thermodynamics are standardized worldwide, allowing for easy international careers.

sub_categories.title: Automobile Engineering
sub_categories.info: Designing and developing vehicles, from traditional petrol engines to modern electric cars (EVs).
sub_categories.skills: IC Engines, Thermodynamics, Vehicle Dynamics, EV Battery Tech

sub_categories.title: Robotics & Automation
sub_categories.info: Designing robots and automated machines for factories, space exploration, and surgery.
sub_categories.skills: Mechatronics, Control Systems, Sensors, CAD Design

sub_categories.title: Aerospace & Aeronautical
sub_categories.info: Focusing on the design and maintenance of aircraft, spacecraft, and missiles.
sub_categories.skills: Aerodynamics, Propulsion Systems, Fluid Mechanics

sub_categories.title: Manufacturing & Production
sub_categories.info: Optimizing factory processes and using 3D printing or CNC machines to create products.
sub_categories.skills: SolidWorks, CATIA, Supply Chain, 3D Printing

mech.jobs: Design Engineer, Manufacturing Engineer, Maintenance Engineer, Project Engineer

electrical.name: Electrical Engineering
electrical.description: The study of electricity, electronics, and electromagnetism, ranging from small electronic circuits to large-scale power transmission.
path_after_10th: Option 1: 11th & 12th Science (PCM) for B.E./B.Tech Degree
Option 2: 3-Year Diploma in Electrical Engineering (Polytechnic)
Option 3: ITI Electrician or Wireman (Direct vocational entry)

benefits.title: Essential Services
benefits.info: Electrical engineers are required in every sector—housing, hospitals, and factories—to manage and maintain power supply.

benefits.title: Renewable Energy Boom
benefits.info: With the shift toward Solar and Wind energy, electrical engineers are at the forefront of the 'Green Revolution'.

benefits.title: Government Job Stability
benefits.info: Huge opportunities in state electricity boards (MSEB/Mahatransco), Railways, and public sector units like BHEL and NTPC.

sub_categories.title: Power Systems & Grids
sub_categories.info: Designing and managing the networks that transport electricity from power plants to homes.
sub_categories.skills: Network Analysis, High Voltage Engineering, Power Electronics

sub_categories.title: Renewable Energy Systems
sub_categories.info: Installing and optimizing solar panels, wind turbines, and energy storage (batteries).
sub_categories.skills: Solar PV Design, Energy Management, Sustainability

sub_categories.title: Control Systems & Instrumentation
sub_categories.info: Automating machines and processes in factories using electrical signals.
sub_categories.skills: PLC/SCADA, Signal Processing, Sensors

sub_categories.title: Electric Vehicle (EV) Technology
sub_categories.info: Working on the electrical motors and charging infrastructure for electric cars and bikes.
sub_categories.skills: Battery Management Systems (BMS), Motor Control, Charging Circuits

electrical.jobs: Power Engineer, Renewable Energy Specialist, Control Systems Engineer

biotech.name: Biotechnology Engineering
biotech.description: The application of engineering principles to the fields of biology and medicine, focusing on developing technologies for healthcare, agriculture, and environmental sustainability.
path_after_10th: Option 1: 11th & 12th Science (PCB) for B.E./B.Tech Degree
Option 2: 3-Year Diploma in Biotechnology (Polytechnic)
Option 3: ITI Lab Technician (Direct entry into biotech labs)

benefits.title: Cutting-Edge Field
benefits.info: Biotechnology is at the forefront of medical breakthroughs, genetic engineering, and sustainable agriculture.

benefits.title: Diverse Career Paths
benefits.info: Work in pharmaceuticals, research labs, agricultural firms, or environmental agencies.

benefits.title: Global Impact
benefits.info: Biotech innovations can improve health outcomes worldwide and address global challenges like food security.

sub_categories.title: Genetic Engineering & CRISPR
sub_categories.info: Editing genes to cure diseases or create genetically modified organisms (GMOs).
sub_categories.skills: Molecular Biology, CRISPR Techniques, Bioinformatics

sub_categories.title: Pharmaceutical Biotechnology
sub_categories.info: Developing new drugs and vaccines using biological processes.
sub_categories.skills: Cell Culture, Drug Development, Clinical Trials

sub_categories.title: Agricultural Biotechnology
sub_categories.info: Creating pest-resistant crops and improving yield through genetic modification.
sub_categories.skills: Plant Biology, Soil Science, GMO Regulations

sub_categories.title: Environmental Biotechnology
sub_categories.info: Using microbes to clean up pollution and manage waste sustainably.
sub_categories.skills: Microbiology, Bioremediation Techniques, Environmental Science

sub_categories.title: Petroleum engineering
sub_categories.info: Extracting oil and gas efficiently while minimizing environmental impact.
sub_categories.skills: Reservoir Engineering, Drilling Technology, Environmental Safety

biotech.jobs: Biotech Researcher, Genetic Engineer, Pharmaceutical Scientist

Medical.tagline: The Noble Path of Healing and Human Care 🏥

overview.name: Digital Marketing & E-commerce
desc: Specializing in online marketing strategies and managing e-commerce platforms.
Critical for businesses to reach customers in the digital age.
Opportunities in digital marketing agencies, e-commerce companies, and corporate marketing departments.
overview.sub: SEO, Social Media Marketing, E-commerce Platforms

overview.name: Project Management
desc: Planning and executing projects on time and within budget across various industries.
Essential for the successful completion of business initiatives.
Opportunities in consulting firms, corporate project management offices, and construction companies.
overview.sub: Project Planning, Risk Management, Agile Methodologies

overview.name: Bachelor of Management Studies (BMS)
desc: Similar to BBA but with a stronger focus on management theories and practices.
Offers a more comprehensive curriculum covering various aspects of management.
Opportunities for specialization in areas like HR, Marketing, Finance, etc.
overview.sub: Leadership, Strategic Thinking, Business Acumen

bba.name: Business Administration (BBA)
bba.description: Focuses on core business principles like marketing, finance, and human resources.
path_after_10th: Option 1: 11th & 12th Commerce (for BBA/BMS)
Option 2: 11th & 12th Science or Arts (for BBA/BMS)
Option 3: Diploma in Business Management (for early entry into business roles)

benefits.title: Versatile Career Paths
benefits.info: Management skills are applicable across industries, from startups to multinational corporations.

benefits.title: Leadership Opportunities
benefits.info: Management roles often lead to executive positions with high earning potential.

benefits.title: Entrepreneurial Skills
benefits.info: Management education provides the tools to start and grow your own business successfully.

sub_categories.title: Business Administration (BBA)
sub_categories.info: Focuses on core business principles like marketing, finance, and human resources.
sub_categories.skills: Leadership, Communication, Strategic Thinking

sub_categories.title: Financial Management
sub_categories.info: Specializing in managing an organization's finances, including investments and risk management.
sub_categories.skills: Financial Analysis, Investment Strategies, Risk Assessment

sub_categories.title: Marketing & Sales Management
sub_categories.info: Creating strategies to promote products and services effectively in the market.
sub_categories.skills: Market Research, Digital Marketing, Consumer Behavior

sub_categories.title: Human Resource Management(HRM)
sub_categories.info: Managing employee relations, recruitment, and organizational development.
sub_categories.skills: Talent Acquisition, Employee Engagement, Labor Laws

sub_categories.title: Operations Management
sub_categories.info: Optimizing business processes to improve efficiency and productivity.
sub_categories.skills: Process Improvement, Supply Chain Management, Quality Control

sub_categories.title: Entrepreneurship & Startups
sub_categories.info: Focusing on creating and managing new business ventures, from ideation to execution.
sub_categories.skills: Business Planning, Fundraising, Innovation

sub_categories.title: Business Analytics
sub_categories.info: Using data analysis and statistical methods to inform business decisions and strategy.
sub_categories.skills: Data Analysis, Statistical Software, Business Intelligence

sub_categories.title: Digital Marketing & E-commerce
sub_categories.info: Specializing in online marketing strategies and managing e-commerce platforms.
sub_categories.skills: SEO, Social Media Marketing, E-commerce Platforms

sub_categories.title: Project Management
sub_categories.info: Planning and executing projects on time and within budget across various industries.
sub_categories.skills: Project Planning, Risk Management, Agile Methodologies

colleges: Shaheed Sukhdev College of Business Studies

overview.name: Design & Creative Field
desc: A dynamic field that blends art, technology, and psychology to create products, visuals, and digital experiences.
Opportunities in various industries like Film, Fashion, Gaming, and Tech Startups.
High demand for designers in the digital age with flexible work options.
overview.sub: UI/UX Design, Graphic Design, Animation, Interior Design, Fashion Design, Game Design, Digital Illustration, Motion Graphics

overview.name: Architecture & Urban Planning
desc: Designing buildings and urban spaces that are functional, sustainable, and aesthetically pleasing.
Combines creativity with technical knowledge of construction and materials.
Opportunities in architectural firms, urban planning agencies, and real estate development.
overview.sub: Architectural Design, Urban Planning, Sustainable Architecture

overview.name: Industrial & Product Design
desc: Creating functional and innovative products that improve people's lives.
Involves understanding user needs, materials, and manufacturing processes.
Opportunities in consumer goods companies, automotive industry, and design consultancies.
overview.sub: Product Design, User-Centered Design, Prototyping

overview.name: Fashion Design
desc: Creating clothing, footwear, and accessories by blending traditional crafts with modern trends.
Requires a strong sense of aesthetics, creativity, and knowledge of textiles.
Opportunities in fashion houses, retail brands, and as independent designers.
overview.sub: Fashion Illustration, Textile Science, Pattern Making

design_creative.name: Design & Creative Field
design_creative.description: A dynamic field that blends art, technology, and psychology to create products, visuals, and digital experiences.
path_after_10th: Option 1: 11th & 12th (Any Stream) — Design is open to Science, Commerce, and Arts students.
Option 2: Diploma in Fine Arts or Graphic Design (1-2 years after 10th).
Option 3: Vocational courses in Animation, VFX, or Interior Decoration.

benefits.title: High Digital Demand
benefits.info: As every business moves online, there is a massive need for designers to create websites, apps, and digital ads.

benefits.title: Creative Freedom
benefits.info: This career allows you to work in diverse industries like Film, Fashion, Gaming, or even Tech Startups.

benefits.title: Freelance & Remote Work
benefits.info: Designers have the highest flexibility to work as freelancers from their homes in rural areas for global clients.

sub_categories.title: UI/UX Design
sub_categories.info: Designing the 'look' and 'feel' of mobile apps and websites to make them easy for people to use.
sub_categories.skills: Figma, Adobe XD, User Psychology, Wireframing

sub_categories.title: Graphic Design & Branding
sub_categories.info: Creating logos, social media posters, and brand identities that tell a story.
sub_categories.skills: Photoshop, Illustrator, Typography, Color Theory

sub_categories.title: Animation & VFX
sub_categories.info: Bringing characters and stories to life for movies, cartoons, and video games.
sub_categories.skills: Maya, After Effects, 3D Modeling, Storyboarding

sub_categories.title: Interior Design
sub_categories.info: Designing beautiful and functional spaces for homes, offices, and public areas.
sub_categories.skills: AutoCAD, Space Planning, Material Knowledge, Client Communication

sub_categories.title: Game Design
sub_categories.info: Creating engaging and interactive video games for entertainment and education.
sub_categories.skills: Unity, C#, Storytelling, Level Design

colleges: Srishti Institute of Art, Design and Technology

fashion_design.name: Fashion Design
fashion_design.tagline: Fashion is a form of self-expression and creativity that can make a powerful statement.
fashion_design.description: Creating clothing, footwear, and accessories by blending traditional crafts with modern trends.
path_after_10th: Option 1: 11th & 12th (Any Stream) — Arts/Humanities is often preferred for base knowledge.
Option 2: Diploma in Fashion Design (1-2 years after 10th).
Option 3: Vocational courses in Textile Design or Fashion Illustration.

benefits.title: Creative Expression
benefits.info: Fashion design allows you to express your creativity and make a statement through clothing.

benefits.title: Diverse Opportunities
benefits.info: You can work in fashion houses, retail brands, or even start your own label.

benefits.title: Global Industry
benefits.info: The fashion industry is global, offering opportunities to work with international brands and clients.

sub_categories.title: Fashion Illustration
sub_categories.info: Creating visual representations of clothing designs to communicate ideas.
sub_categories.skills: Drawing, Adobe Illustrator, Creativity, Attention to Detail

sub_categories.title: Textile Science
sub_categories.info: Understanding the properties and behavior of fabrics to create better clothing and accessories.
sub_categories.skills: Material Science, Fabric Testing, Sustainable Textiles

sub_categories.title: Pattern Making & Garment Construction
sub_categories.info: Translating fashion designs into actual garments through pattern making and sewing.
sub_categories.skills: Pattern Drafting, Sewing Techniques, Garment Fitting

architecture.name: Architecture & Urban Planning
architecture.tagline: Designing the Future of Our Cities and Spaces 🏙️
architecture.description: Designing buildings and urban spaces that are functional, sustainable, and aesthetically pleasing.
path_after_10th: Option 1: 11th & 12th Science (PCM) with English as a compulsory subject and then give entrance exams for B.Arch admission.
Option 2: Diploma in Architecture (3 years after 10th) for early entry into architectural firms.

benefits.title: Creative Impact on Society
benefits.info: Architects shape the built environment, influencing how people live, work, and interact.

benefits.title: Diverse Career Opportunities
benefits.info: Work in architectural firms, urban planning agencies, real estate development, or start your own practice.

benefits.title: Sustainable Design
benefits.info: Opportunity to contribute to sustainable development by designing eco-friendly buildings and cities.

sub_categories.title: Architectural Design
sub_categories.info: Creating innovative building designs that are both functional and aesthetically pleasing.
sub_categories.skills: AutoCAD, Revit, Creativity, Structural Knowledge

sub_categories.title: Urban Planning
sub_categories.info: Designing urban spaces that are sustainable, efficient, and livable.
sub_categories.skills: GIS Software, Urban Economics, Public Policy

sub_categories.title: Sustainable Architecture
sub_categories.info: Focusing on eco-friendly design principles to reduce environmental impact.
sub_categories.skills: Green Building Design, Energy Efficiency, Material Science

scholarships: AICTE Pragati Scholarship for Students from Economically Weaker Sections

industrial_design.name: Industrial & Product Design
industrial_design.tagline: Creating Innovative Products that Shape Our Lives 🛠️
industrial_design.description: Creating functional and innovative products that improve people's lives.
path_after_10th: Option 1: 11th & 12th Science (PCM) with English as a compulsory subject and then give entrance exams for B.Des in Product Design admission.
Option 2: Diploma in Industrial Design (3 years after 10th) for early entry into product design roles.

benefits.title: Impact on Daily Life
benefits.info: Industrial designers create products that people use every day, from smartphones to household appliances.

benefits.title: Diverse Career Opportunities
benefits.info: Work in consumer goods companies, automotive industry, design consultancies, or start your own product design firm.

benefits.title: Innovation & Creativity
benefits.info: This field allows you to combine creativity with technical knowledge to solve real-world problems.

sub_categories.title: Product Design
sub_categories.info: Designing consumer products that are functional, aesthetically pleasing, and user-friendly.
sub_categories.skills: CAD Software, Prototyping, User-Centered Design

sub_categories.title: User-Centered Design
sub_categories.info: Focusing on designing products that meet the needs and preferences of users.
sub_categories.skills: User Research, Usability Testing, Human Factors

sub_categories.title: Prototyping & Manufacturing
sub_categories.info: Creating prototypes and understanding manufacturing processes to bring designs to life.
sub_categories.skills: 3D Printing, CNC Machining, Material Science

colleges: Srishti Institute of Art, Design and Technology

Government.tagline: Serving the Nation with Integrity and Excellence 🇮🇳

overview.name: Civil Services
desc: Prestigious services like IAS, IPS, and IFS that govern the country.
Direct role in administration, policy making, and public welfare.
Highly competitive with rigorous preparation required.
overview.sub: IAS, IPS, IFS, State Civil Services

overview.name: Defense Services
desc: Serving in the Indian Army, Navy, or Air Force.
Leadership, discipline, adventure, and national pride.
Physical fitness and dedication are essential.
overview.sub: Army, Navy, Air Force, BSF, CRPF, ITBP, Assam Rifles,CISF

overview.name: Public Sector Undertakings (PSUs)
desc: Working in government-owned corporations like ONGC, BHEL, SAIL, etc.
Stable jobs with good salaries and benefits.
Opportunities in engineering, finance, HR, and more.
overview.sub: Oil & Gas, Power, Steel, Banking, Finance, HR

overview.name: Judiciary & Legal Services
desc: Becoming a judge, lawyer, or legal advisor in government institutions.
Upholding justice and contributing to the legal system.
Requires a law degree and passing relevant exams.
overview.sub: Judges, Public Prosecutors, Legal Advisors

overview.name: Education & Research Services
desc: Teaching and research positions in government schools and colleges.
Contributing to the development of education and knowledge.
Requires relevant degrees and passing teaching eligibility tests.
overview.sub: Government Schools, Colleges, Research Institutions

civil_services.name: Civil Services
civil_services.description: Prestigious services like IAS, IPS, and IFS that govern the country.
path_after_10th: Option 1: 11th & 12th (Any Stream) with English as a compulsory subject and then prepare for UPSC Civil Services Exam.
Option 2: Diploma in Public Administration after 10th for early entry into government administrative roles.

benefits.title: Prestige and Influence
benefits.info: Civil servants hold influential positions in government and society, contributing to national development.

benefits.title: Diverse Career Opportunities
benefits.info: Work in various departments like administration, police, foreign service, revenue, etc.

benefits.title: Job Security and Benefits
benefits.info: Government jobs offer stability, good salaries, pensions, and other benefits.

sub_categories.title: Indian Administrative Service (IAS)
sub_categories.info: Responsible for policy implementation and administration at various levels of government.
sub_categories.skills: Leadership, Policy Analysis, Public Administration

sub_categories.title: Indian Police Service (IPS)
sub_categories.info: Maintaining law and order, preventing crime, and ensuring public safety.
sub_categories.skills: Crisis Management, Law Enforcement, Community Policing

sub_categories.title: Indian Foreign Service (IFS)
sub_categories.info: Representing India abroad and managing diplomatic relations.
sub_categories.skills: Diplomacy, International Relations, Cultural Sensitivity

civil_services.salary: ₹56,100 - ₹2,50,000 per month (varies by rank and department)
colleges: Civil services do not require a specific college but having a degree from a reputed institution can be beneficial.
scholarships: NO scholarships for civil services but various coaching institutes offer scholarships for UPSC preparation.

defense_services.name: Defense Services
defense_services.description: Serving in the Indian Army, Navy, or Air Force.
path_after_10th: Option 1: 11th & 12th Science (PCM) with English as a compulsory subject and then give entrance exams for NDA or AFCAT admission.
Option 2: Join the National Defence Academy (NDA) after 10th for early entry into defense services.

benefits.title: National Pride and Service
benefits.info: Serving in the defense forces is a matter of great pride and contributes to national security.

benefits.title: Adventure and Discipline
benefits.info: A career in defense offers opportunities for adventure, travel, and instills discipline and leadership skills.

benefits.title: Job Security and Benefits
benefits.info: Defense personnel receive good salaries, pensions, healthcare, and other benefits.

sub_categories.title: Indian Army
sub_categories.info: Responsible for land-based military operations and defense.
sub_categories.skills: Combat Skills, Leadership, Physical Fitness

sub_categories.title: Indian Navy
sub_categories.info: Responsible for maritime defense and operations.
sub_categories.skills: Navigation, Seamanship, Naval Warfare

sub_categories.title: Indian Air Force
sub_categories.info: Responsible for aerial defense and operations.
sub_categories.skills: Flying Skills, Aeronautical Knowledge, Combat Tactics

defense_services.salary: ₹56,100 - ₹2,50,000 per month (varies by rank and branch)
colleges: Defense academies like NDA, IMA, OTA, AFA, and NA are the primary training centers.
scholarships: Coaching institutes often provide merit-based aid for defense entrance exams.

public_sector.name: Public Sector Undertakings (PSUs)
public_sector.description: Working in government-owned corporations like ONGC, BHEL, SAIL, etc.
path_after_10th: Option 1: 11th & 12th Science (PCM) for Engineering/Finance degrees.
Option 2: Diploma in Engineering for technical roles.

benefits.title: Stable Career
benefits.info: PSUs offer job security, competitive salaries, and extensive benefits.

benefits.title: National Impact
benefits.info: Contribute directly to the country's economic and industrial growth.

sub_categories.title: Technical Roles
sub_categories.info: Engineers managing plants and infrastructure.
sub_categories.skills: Core Engineering, Safety Protocols, Project Management

colleges: Degree from recognized universities; Engineering from IITs/NITs is highly valued.
scholarships: No direct PSU scholarships; standard engineering scholarships apply.

judiciary.name: Judiciary & Legal Services
judiciary.description: Becoming a judge, lawyer, or legal advisor in government institutions.
path_after_10th: Option 1: 11th & 12th (Any Stream) then 5-year integrated LLB.
Option 2: Graduation then 3-year LLB.

benefits.title: Upholding Justice
benefits.info: Contribution to the legal system and ensuring fair justice.

sub_categories.title: Judicial Officers
sub_categories.info: Presiding over cases in district or high courts.
sub_categories.skills: Legal Research, Integrity, Analytical Thinking

colleges: National Law Universities (NLUs) and other reputed Law Colleges.
scholarships: Coaching scholarships for judicial services exams.

education.name: Education & Research Services
education.description: Teaching and research positions in government institutions.
path_after_10th: Option 1: 12th then B.Ed/D.Ed for teaching.
Option 2: Masters/PhD for professor roles.

benefits.title: Nation Building
benefits.info: Shaping the minds of future generations.

sub_categories.title: Teaching
sub_categories.info: Working in schools or colleges.
sub_categories.skills: Pedagogy, Subject Expertise, Communication

colleges: UGC recognized Universities and B.Ed colleges.
